description: Soft, painterly colour transitions with bleeding edges, mimicking watercolour on wet paper. Value FBM drives the base wash; light domain warp adds edge bleed; a thin Gabor grain overlay adds paper texture.

modifiers.comment: Creates soft bleeding edges characteristic of wet-on-wet watercolour
Adds subtle paper grain / brush texture

example_prompts: create a soft watercolour wash with bleeding colour edges and paper grain
make a painterly background with pastel washes and gentle domain bleed

screenshot_metadata.notes: Render at 1024x1024. Apply a soft pastel colour palette mapped through the value FBM output. The Gabor grain should be barely perceptible — a whisper of texture.
